titleStmt.title: SII 23.302: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 302. (A.R. No. 302 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 3: 1119-20 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription begins with introduction Pūmādu puṇara etc. It registers a gift of some lands, two vēli in extent, to the temple of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷīśvaram-Uḍaiyār mentioned above, by one Tiruviśalūraḍigaḷ-Bhaṭṭaṉ of Araṇaippuṟam after purchasiṅg them from the owners. These lands and the lands already in possession of the temple and measuring one vēli were now made tax-free by the assembly of Śōḻamārttāṇḍachaturvēdimaṅgalam, on receipt of 105 kāśu from Śrīkaṇṭha-Śiva the founder of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmātu puṇarap pukaḻmātu vaḷara ṉāmātu viḷaṅkac cayamātu nilavat tannirupatumalar mannavar cūṭa manniya Urimaiyil maṇimuṭi cūṭic ceṅkolceṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷaṟppa veṅkali niṅki mey yaṟantaḻaippa k kaṭalmalai Utaittu valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti Iru cuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟa vi
rasimhāsanattu mukkokkiḻāṉaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya koppara kecaripanmarāṉa tribhuvanaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrī vikramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu virutarājapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭuc coḻamāttāṇṭac caruppeti maṅkalattuk kiḻpiṭākai maṅkalakkuṭi nilattu Uṭaiyār svāmidevar śrīkaṇṭhaśivar Uṭaiyār śrīkulottuṅka coḻadevaṟku naṉṟāka Eḻuntaruḷuvitta kulottuṅkacoḷiśvara muṭai veṇṭum niman=taṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka Ivvūr Araṇaip puṟattut tiruvicalūr
aṭikaḷpaṭṭan Ittevar mūlabhratyar Ādicaṇḍeśvaradevaṟku dāṉamāka nirvārttukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr kuntavivatikkuk kiḻakku Aru moḻi tevavāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟup patiṉaiñcāñ catirattum patiṉāṟāñ catirattum patiṉeḻāñ catirattum nilam Araiye Irumāvaraiye Araikkāṇiyum Ivvūrk kārampucceṭṭut tiru varaṅkanārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉpakkal patineṭṭa ṭṭukkoṇṭa nilam Āṟumāvum Irāyūrc coṭṭaic caṅkaraṉārāyaṇapa
ṭṭanpakkal kācu Iṭṭuk koṇṭa ṉilam Eḻumāvaraiyum Aiñcāṅkaṭ ṭaḷaiyil muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟup patiṉeḻāñ catirattum patiṉeṭṭāñ catirattum Ittevar śrīkoyilālum tirumuṟṟattālum tiruṉanta vaṉattālum tirukkuḷattālum ṉilam veliyum Āka ṉilam Iraṇṭe Aṟumāvaraikkāṇiyum Ittevar mūlabhratarādicaṇḍeśvaradevaṟkuk kāṇiyāy Ittevaṟku veṇṭu ppatākavum Ivvūr kārampuc ceṭṭut tiruvaraṅkaṉārāyaṇapaṭṭaṟpakka
l koṇṭa ṉilam Araiye muṉṟumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Iva nukkuk kāṇiyāy It tevaṟku veṇṭum ṉimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppa tākavum Āka ṉilam muvelikku veṇṭum Iṟaikkup policaikku Uṭaiyār śrīkaṇṭhaśivaruṭaiyārpakkal nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu nūṟṟorupattaiñcu Ikkācu nūṟṟorupattaiñcukkum pe raye Innilattukku Iṟaiyāka Innilam panniraṇṭān tarattile
Iṟaiyiḻicci Itdevarkku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku candrādit taval Iṟuppatāka Ikkācu koṇṭu mūlabhṛtyarādicaṇḍeśvaradevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatumutal Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭuttom coḻamāt tāṇṭaccaturvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Eḻuti nen Ivvūr karaṇattān patmanābhan ceyyavāymaṇiyāṉa mahājana vriyaṉeṉ ppaṭikku Ivai vaṅkippuṟattuc cakrapāṇipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai ku rkaṭal ciṟukāḷaiyeṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai muppirāl tiruvicalūr Aṭikaḷpaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tuvetaik komapuṟattuc citarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pacumpuṟattut tirukkāḷapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kurovip pavaceṉapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Araṇaippuṟattu takṣiṇāmūrttibhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūrt tiruveṇkāṭapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai va
ṅkippuṟat ntaraṉ pa ci Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai māvaṇṭūr nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai veṇṇippottuc ciriḷaṅko paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭūr lābhaṭṭa somayāci Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṅkippuṟattuk kecavabhaṭṭa somayāvi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai māṅkaḷūr nārāyaṇan tuṟkaipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ceṭṭapocan Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa haṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
Ivai kuñcappavil śrīraṅkanātaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Iruṅ kaṇṭip periyanampi paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai māṅkaḷūr piccatevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 23.302 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
